prompt: Tap the small blind seat before selecting action.
why_v1: Small blind anchor confirms early position before protection action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The small blind keeps the out-of-position defender in view, so the protection bet stays tied to charging overcards and draws first.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The small blind is the key anchor in this rep, so confirm that seat before choosing the protection line.
